summary: Executed backend pytest + frontend Playwright for requested phase-aware behavior across text/manual/file; found one critical mixed-dataset comparison bug.

critical.issue: When both phases exist in same areas but with different issues (no exact area+issue pair match), API still enables before-vs-after comparison and computes awareness_change_percent instead of returning no-comparison mode.

minor.issue: Legacy regression assertions in test_platform_core_flows.py are stale for current phase-aware insight copy and fail despite expected behavior for other scenarios.
Public URL page load event intermittently times out in automation (app still becomes interactive and tests proceed).

integration_issues.issue: UI shows awareness_change_percent (44.44%) and positive comparison insight for data with no exact matching area+issue pairs, because backend mixed-mode comparison aggregates only by area.

action_items: Fix compute_analysis mixed-mode comparison guard: require exact (area, issue) pair overlap between before and after before enabling has_awareness_data.
After fix, retest /api/analysis/text, /api/analysis/manual, and /api/analysis/file with same-area-different-issue inputs.
Update stale assertions in /app/backend/tests/test_platform_core_flows.py to current insight expectations.
critical_code_review_comments: parse_flexible_text correctly supports Before Awareness/After Awareness headings and avoids false phase assumptions for before-only and after-only text.
Bug source is in compute_analysis mixed-mode branch: comparable_areas checks area-level before/after totals, not exact area+issue overlap, causing invalid comparisons.
Frontend wiring and data-testid coverage are good for tested paths (text/manual/file workflows are automatable end-to-end).
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_* users and analysis records through API/UI during execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Most requested scenarios pass. Critical remaining gap: mixed dataset with same areas but different issues still triggers comparison. Repro input is documented in new failing pytest and UI repro screenshot.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: submit text with Before(Patna-Environment, Siwan-Water) and After(Patna-Health, Siwan-Crime). Expected no comparison since no exact area+issue pair exists. Actual output shows awareness_change_percent and positive trend by area. Root cause: server.py compute_analysis mixed-mode sets comparable_areas using area-level before/after counts only; this bypasses exact pair matching requirement and creates false comparison semantics.
